name: All Active Customers
description: Subscribers with an active paid invoice or valid plan in past 30 days.
aiSuggestions: Optimal channel is Email with 11:00 AM dispatch time.
High probability of cross-selling security certificates.

name: Premium Members
description: High-value corporate clusters billing greater than ₹50,000 annually.
aiSuggestions: WhatsApp channel yields a 92% response index here.

name: Cold Leads Q2
description: Marketing leads captured during Q2 events that haven't converted to demo stage.
aiSuggestions: Offer a 30-day extended trial or aggressive coupon discount.
SMS works best as an abrupt short-format wake-up nudge.

name: SaaS Trial Signups
description: Users who activated free trials within the last 14 days and have not subscribed.
aiSuggestions: Trigger onboarding guide triggers automatically to reduce drop-off rates.
